title: Atheneum
description: A highly configurable enchantment overhaul mod for Fabric.
body:
# ✨ The vanilla enchantment table is boring, so I fixed it. ✨

***Note: Atheneum is in Alpha! There will likely be many breaking changes until the first official stable version is released!***
  
## Features  
  
- New Enchantment Table screen and enchanting stats
- Revamped enchanting mechanics  
- Plenty of configurable library components  
- More enchantments  
  
## FAQ

### How can I report bugs?

Feel free to report bugs, incompatibility issues, or ideas to improve Atheneum in the [Github Issues](https://github.com/JayPixl/atheneum/issues) or [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/63FjWBbh)
  
### Can I use Atheneum in my modpack?

Absolutely! See the [configuration guide](https://github.com/JayPixl/atheneum/wiki/Configuration) to get started configuring Atheneum.
